title: polystichum mucronifolium
intro: Polystichum mucronifolium, also known as the needle fern or sharp-leaf fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum mucronifolium include its potential to alleviate symptoms of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Polystichum mucronifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
